spec.name: Soul Counter Point
spec.summary: Disrupts soul neuro flux as a point focus at line-of-sight reach, targeting one individual with sustained channeling by creating a fresh flux expression.
spec.effect_description: Disrupts soul neuro flux as a point focus at line-of-sight reach, targeting one individual with sustained channeling by creating a fresh flux expression. A circle counter/create recipe that channels soul discipline into neuro output. It applies a point pattern against individual across line-of-sight reach with sustained persistence. The sustained window is set to 20 minutes.
